title: isodon effusus f. leucanthus
intro: Isodon effusus f. leucanthus, also known as white-leaved isodon, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as isodonoside and leucanthoside. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and protecting against infections. Herbal preparations of Isodon effusus f. leucanthus are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
